accuracy_policy: No fabricated songs, artists, counts, associations, or quota padding. Exact counters are separated from scores/proxies; every row preserves provenance and snapshot/retrieval timing.

notes:
build failed: RuntimeError: POST https://graphql.anilist.co failed: Client error '400 Bad Request' for url 'https://graphql.anilist.co'
For more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/400
Combined file globally sorted; extra.era_rank preserves each bucket's internal rank.
Composer is populated only when explicitly supplied by source; performer remains main_artist.

Holodex topic classification with mentions/channel metadata; exact YouTube views used when available, Spotify streams used on confident catalog matches, subscriber counts only as an explicitly labeled proxy. Finite verified corpus is never padded.
Emerging/promising is a documented heuristic, not an objective fact; source_anchor_year=2024.

Source-declared soundtrack/score metadata plus a narrowly curated, independently sourced association seed for famous needle-drop/theme cases. No fan-only association is accepted without a cited source.

Holodex topic classification with mentions/channel metadata; exact YouTube views used when available, Spotify streams used on confident catalog matches, subscriber counts only as an explicitly labeled proxy. Finite verified corpus is never padded.
Conditional list: never padded. Completeness requires exhaustive VocaDB enumeration and remains bounded by acquired Spotify stream-snapshot coverage.

countries.target: 1,000 per detected Spotify regional market (76 detected this run)
notes: Detected 76 country/territory Spotify chart markets from the source index; 73 have exactly 1000 ranked unique songs.
Country chart counts are exact chart-attributed streams, not lifetime Spotify totals; streams outside the daily Top 200 are excluded.

megalist.target: deduplicated union of all requested lists
notes: Megalist is a deduplicated union of materialized rows; completeness is false because one or more upstream requested lists are incomplete.

spotify_top10000_2023.url: bundled historical public snapshot; see docs/SOURCES.md

vocadb_candidate_scan.note: Bounded high-popularity scan to respect VocaDB API usage guidance; qualifying Spotify threshold remains strict.

completion_rule: Do not treat this repository as fully complete unless completion_summary.all_requested_lists_complete is true and validation/target checks pass. Conditional/finite corpora are never padded.
